mentor-mentee.setting: A regular weekly 1:1 — the mentee has had a tough week and needs to vent before getting unstuck.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Listen without rushing to fix; surface what the mentee is actually stuck on.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Get unblocked on a frustrating problem at work.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee just shipped a bug that briefly broke production. They are mortified.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Help the mentee process the mistake constructively without minimizing it.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Understand if their job is at risk and how to make it right.
mentor-mentee.partner_secret: Has been quietly applying to other companies in case they get fired.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee wants advice on negotiating a raise at the upcoming review.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Coach them through articulating their value without overstepping HR.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Get specific, actionable language for the conversation.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee is considering a hard pivot to a different specialty.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Help them think it through without pushing one direction.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Decide whether to commit to the pivot.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentor must deliver tough feedback the mentee did not see coming.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Hear it without spiraling and walk out with a plan.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee opens up about feeling like a fraud despite recent wins.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Validate without being dismissive; offer perspective.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Find a way to function despite the feeling.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee is in a low-grade conflict with a peer and wants advice.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Help them think about the peer's perspective without taking sides.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Decide whether to confront, escalate, or let it go.
mentor-mentee.partner_secret: Has been venting about the peer to a third coworker — feels guilty.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee just had a major success and wants to share it.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Celebrate authentically; help them extract lessons.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Feel seen and figure out what to do next.

mentor-mentee.setting: Mentor has noticed the mentee is showing signs of burnout and gently brings it up.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Surface the concern without overstepping; offer concrete support.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Be honest about how they are doing.
mentor-mentee.partner_secret: Has been working 60+ hour weeks but afraid to admit it.

mentor-mentee.setting: Practical session on improving day-to-day workflow and tools.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Share practical tips that fit the mentee's actual context.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Walk away with two or three things to try this week.

mentor-mentee.setting: Mentee is being asked to take on more than they think is reasonable. They want help saying no.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Help them craft language; respect their judgment about the boundary.
mentor-mentee.partner_goal: Get out of the meeting with a smaller scope.

mentor-mentee.setting: The mentee, sensing something is off with the mentor, gently asks how they are doing.
mentor-mentee.agent_goal: Be honest without making the mentee feel responsible.
mentor-mentee.agent_secret: Going through a hard personal stretch they have not shared.
